_help.watch: List of courses to watch. Each entry: {subject, and either course_number OR course_prefix}. Optional sections:[{crn}] / [{section}] narrows to specific sections; omit to watch all sections of that course.
_help.ntfy_topic: Subscribe to this exact topic in the ntfy phone app. Keep it private.
_help.poll_seconds: Seconds between checks. 600 = every 10 minutes (only used when running locally/continuously).
_help.notify_on_waitlist: true = also alert when a waitlist opens up, not just open seats.
_help.notify_current_open: false = on startup learn current state quietly and only ping when something newly opens.
